about.title: About Johan Castellanos
about.bio: Johan Castellanos is a dedicated author, speaker, and Bible prophecy researcher. With years of study in eschatology and world affairs, Johan brings a unique Christian perspective to understanding current events through the lens of Scripture. His work bridges the gap between biblical prophecy and modern geopolitics, helping readers prepare spiritually and intellectually for the times ahead.
about.missionText: JCM (Johan Castellanos Memos) exists to equip believers and seekers with in-depth analysis of world events from a biblical perspective. Through weekly content, books, and community engagement, we aim to foster understanding of Bible prophecy, encourage faith, and prepare the body of Christ for the coming Kingdom.

sections.heading: Acceptance of Terms
sections.body: By accessing and using the JCM (Johan Castellanos Memos) website and services, you agree to be bound by these Terms and Conditions. If you do not agree with any part of these terms, please do not use our services.

sections.heading: Use of Service
sections.body: Our services are provided for informational and educational purposes. You may access and use the content for personal, non-commercial use. Any reproduction, distribution, or modification of content without prior written consent is prohibited.

sections.heading: User Accounts
sections.body: When creating an account, you must provide accurate and complete information. You are responsible for maintaining the confidentiality of your account credentials and for all activities that occur under your account.

sections.heading: Intellectual Property
sections.body: All content on this website, including but not limited to text, graphics, logos, images, audio, video, and software, is the property of JCM and is protected by international copyright laws.

sections.heading: Limitation of Liability
sections.body: JCM shall not be liable for any indirect, incidental, special, consequential, or punitive damages resulting from your use of or inability to use our services. Our total liability shall not exceed the amount paid by you for the service.

sections.heading: Modifications
sections.body: We reserve the right to modify these Terms and Conditions at any time. Changes will be effective immediately upon posting on the website. Your continued use of our services after changes are posted constitutes your acceptance of the modified terms.

sections.heading: Contact
sections.body: If you have any questions about these Terms and Conditions, please contact us at info@jcm.com.

sections.heading: Information We Collect
sections.body: We collect information you provide directly, such as your name, email address, and account details when you register. We also automatically collect certain data including your IP address, browser type, device information, and usage patterns when you interact with our services.

sections.heading: How We Use Your Information
sections.body: We use the information collected to provide and improve our services, personalize your experience, send you updates and newsletters you have subscribed to, process transactions, and communicate with you about your account or our services.

sections.heading: Cookies and Tracking
sections.body: We use cookies and similar tracking technologies to enhance your browsing experience, analyze site traffic, and understand where our visitors come from. You can control cookie preferences through your browser settings. Essential cookies are required for the site to function properly.

sections.heading: Data Sharing
sections.body: We do not sell your personal information to third parties. We may share your data with trusted service providers who assist in operating our website and services, subject to confidentiality agreements. We may also disclose information when required by law.

sections.heading: Data Security
sections.body: We implement industry-standard security measures to protect your personal information, including encryption, secure servers, and regular security audits. However, no method of transmission over the internet is 100% secure, and we cannot guarantee absolute security.

sections.heading: Your Rights
sections.body: You have the right to access, correct, or delete your personal data. You can update your account information at any time through your dashboard settings. To request data deletion, please contact us at info@jcm.com. We will respond to your request within 30 days.

sections.heading: Children's Privacy
sections.body: Our services are not directed to individuals under the age of 13. We do not knowingly collect personal information from children. If we become aware that a child has provided us with personal data, we will take steps to delete such information.

sections.heading: Contact
sections.body: If you have any questions about this Privacy Policy or our data practices, please contact us at info@jcm.com.

blog.content1: In today's rapidly changing world, understanding the intersection of faith, prophecy, and current events has never been more important. This article explores the deep connections between biblical teachings and the realities we face in our modern society.
blog.content2: Through careful study of Scripture and analysis of world affairs, we can gain clarity on the challenges ahead. The prophetic texts offer not just warnings, but also hope and guidance for those who seek to understand God's plan for humanity.
blog.content3: As we navigate these complex times, it is essential to remain grounded in faith while staying informed about global developments. The coming years will bring significant changes, and being prepared both spiritually and intellectually will be crucial for believers worldwide.

bookHome.storyTitle: A Story of Survival and Hope
bookHome.storyDescription: Discover a gripping historical novel set against the backdrop of a nation in crisis. Follow the lives of ordinary people as they navigate extraordinary challenges, resilience, and the enduring human spirit in "The Great Famine".
bookHome.copyright: © 2024 The Great Famine. All rights reserved.

bookReader.chapterContent: The roads became rivers of humanity, ragged families carrying their few possessions, trudging towards the workhouses or the ports. The air was thick with the scent of the rotting potatoes, a constant reminder of the catastrophe. Despite the efforts of some relief committees, hunger gnawed at every soul, and the specter of death was never far.
bookReader.highlightText: ragged families carrying their few possessions
